Referral__AlreadyReferred().details: Reverts when a referee already has a referrer (first-referrer-wins rule).

Referral__CapReached().details: Reverts when a referrer has hit the MAX_REFERRALS_PER_ADDRESS cap.

Referral__SelfReferral().details: Reverts when a user attempts to refer themselves.

Referral__ZeroAddress().details: Reverts when the referrer address is address(0).

registerReferral(address).details: This is the PERMANENT on-chain record of who referred whom.

params.referrer: The address that should receive the referral bonus.

MAX_REFERRALS_PER_ADDRESS.details: V7 Final: Cap at 10 to preserve decentralisation and discourage farming rings.

referrerOf.details: Set once in registerReferral(). Never overwritten — first referrer wins.

ReferralRegistered(address,address,uint2.notice: Emitted whenever a referral relationship is registered on-chain.

MAX_REFERRALS_PER_ADDRESS().notice: Maximum number of referred wallets a single address can receive bonus for.

getReferrer(address).notice: Get the referrer for a given user.

referralCount(address).notice: Number of wallets successfully referred by a given address.

referrerOf(address).notice: The address that referred a given user.

userdoc.notice: Lightweight on-chain registry for the Kerne referral graph. ─── ARCHITECTURE RATIONALE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── Storing referral balances on-chain per transaction would be gas intensive. Instead, this contract serves as a TRUSTLESS EVENT LOG for the off-chain snapshot service:   • Referral relationships are stored on-chain (must be tamper-proof and non-repudiable).   • The snapshot bot reads this graph daily to calculate the 10% Hard Yield kickbacks     which are eventually distributed through the KerneYieldDistributor via a Merkle tree.
